name: smart-fan-wasm
description: Browser GUI (Rust + WebAssembly) for the smart-fan ESP32

scripts.build: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen ./target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/smart_fan_wasm.wasm --out-dir public/wasm --target web
scripts.build:debug: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen ./target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/smart_fan_wasm.wasm --out-dir public/wasm --target web --debug
